description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish and a cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The receiver features a prominent magazine well with a curved detachable box magazine, and the fire selector markings are visible in red. The rifle has a pistol grip and a short, fixed stock, making it suitable for close-quarters use. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with the front sight post and rear sight both visible. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with ribbed texturing on the suppressor for grip. The construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of tactical firearms used in urban environments.
description: A compact black rifle with a suppressor, curved magazine, and iron sights, featuring a pistol grip and short fixed stock. The design is sleek and tactical, with red fire selector markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the suppressor, curved magazine, pistol grip, and red fire selector markings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the suppressor, magazine, and the other side of the receiver with less visible markings.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and magazine.
